title: Audit Specialist
responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: TalentGrid is hiring a junior audit specialist to support reviewing financial processes, controls, and compliance activities.
raw_text: Vacancy V080: Audit Specialist at TalentGrid. Location: Kharkiv. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 1.1 years. Required skills: audit, excel, financial reporting, internal controls, risk assessment, documentation, process review. Optional skills: stakeholder management, policy review, power bi. Responsibilities: perform audit procedures and control testing; document findings and prepare audit reports; recommend improvements for compliance and risk mitigation.
